verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Let Your Word be born In the manger of my heart, Let It live in me, let It start; Live inside this house of clay, And mold me everyday; Let Your Word be born In the manger of my heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well, outwardly I'm nothing, Not much to behold, Unlikely the place for His Word to unfold; But if I'll just yield this vessel, And let Him have His way; From glory unto glory, He'll change me day by day.
